title: pterocypsela elata
intro: Pterocypsela elata is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, known for its medicinal and edible properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Pterocypsela elata is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, such as relieving congestion and soothing sore throats. Additionally, the plant's leaves and flowers can be consumed raw or added to salads, providing a rich source of vitamins and antioxidants.
